violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the Bar dishwasher was (25) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment shall sanitize in 3-bay sink until dishwasher is serviced and in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the (kitchen area). New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
